title: stylocline filaginea
intro: Stylocline filaginea is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and anti-inflammatory agent, making it useful in treating conditions such as kidney stones and arthritis. Stylocline filaginea has been traditionally used to promote health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be administered orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
